title: MANAGER
description:
OSE Construction Pte. Ltd. is seeking a proactive and experienced Construction Project Manager to lead and manage construction projects from start to finish. You will be responsible for planning, execution, monitoring, and successful delivery of construction projects, ensuring they are completed on time, within scope and budget, and in compliance with all regulatory and safety requirements in Singapore.

Project Management

  • Lead and manage all phases of construction projects from inception to completion.
  • Prepare and manage project schedules, budgets, and resource plans.
  • Coordinate with consultants, architects, engineers, and relevant authorities.

Site Supervision

  • Conduct regular site inspections to monitor progress, quality, and compliance.
  • Liaise with subcontractors, site supervisors, and construction workers.
  • Resolve issues or delays on-site promptly.

Compliance & Safety

  • Implement and enforce workplace safety and health (WSH) policies.
  • Oversee quality assurance and control protocols.

Stakeholder Coordination

  • Serve as the main point of contact between the company, clients, and stakeholders.
  • Provide regular updates and progress reports to senior management and clients.
  • Ensure timely approval of project deliverables and changes.

Budget & Cost Control

  • Prepare cost estimates and monitor expenditures against budgets.
  • Approve procurement orders, invoices, and progress claims.
  • Identify cost-saving opportunities without compromising quality.

Planning and Scheduling: Developing project plans, schedules, and budgets, and monitoring progress against these.

Coordination: Working with architects, engineers, contractors, subcontractors, and clients to ensure smooth project execution.

Resource Management: Managing resources including personnel, materials, and equipment.

Budget Management: Tracking project costs and ensuring adherence to the budget.

Quality Control: Implementing quality control procedures and ensuring compliance with building codes and safety regulations.

Skills and Qualifications

  • Risk Management: Identifying potential risks and developing mitigation strategies.
  • Communication: Maintaining clear and effective communication with all stakeholders.
  • Contract Negotiation: Negotiating and managing contracts with subcontractors and suppliers.
  • Project Management Skills: Proven experience in planning, organizing, and managing construction projects.
  • Technical Knowledge: Understanding of construction methods, materials, and building codes.
  • Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Leadership Skills: Ability to lead and motivate a team of construction professionals.
  • Problem-Solving Skills: Ability to identify and resolve issues that may arise during a project.
  • Safety Compliance:Ensuring that all work is conducted in accordance with relevant safety regulations and guidelines.

Experience

  • Minimum 15 years of relevant experience in the Singapore construction industry.
  • Proven track record of successful project delivery in a leadership role.
  • Experience working with BCA submission and regulatory processes.

Technical Skills

  • Proficiency in project management tools (e.g. Microsoft Project, Primavera, Procore).
  • Strong knowledge of local building codes, safety regulations, and construction standards.
  • Ability to read and interpret architectural and engineering drawings.
